h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but inferred as large, centered, serif, all-caps based on footer style.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample; likely bold serif with significant leading.

visual_matchers.pattern: Numbered paragraph at the bottom of the page, smaller font size than body text
Italicized Latin phrases or book titles
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Emphasis or nomenclature (e.g., Homo sapiens, a priori)

visual_matchers.pattern: Text enclosed in quotation marks for specific terminology
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Defined concepts or specific labels (e.g., 'Response Card')

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX inline ($...$) or block ($$...$$) for statistical notation.

margin_noise_patterns.footer_left: Arabic numeral followed by period and text (Footnote)
margin_noise_patterns.footer_right: All-caps serif text followed by Roman numerals (Running title and page number, e.g., BEHAVIORAL ECONOMICS PRACTICUM XXV)
